Pickup quote

"May your rage bring haste"

Item icon

Collectible ID

695

Entity ID

5.100.695

Item pool

  • Devil Room
  • Treasure Room
  • Ultra Secret Room
  • Devil Room
  • Treasure Room

Quality

Tags

2

Collection grid

(page 6, column 3, row 5)

Unlock method

Defeat Mother as Samson

Effects[edit]

  • When Isaac takes damage, he gains Speed and Fire Rate for the rest of the floor.
    • Speed gained per hit is (0.04x previous hits taken) +0.07.
    • Fire Rate gained per hit is (0.1x previous hits taken) + 0.25.
      • Both effects stack up to six times, for a total of +1.02 speed and +3 fire rate.
      • Fire rate bonuses can exceed the normal maximum fire rate limit.
